courses_sub: Learn to reprogram your mind for abundance.
courses_hero_sub: Learning paths designed by mentors to accelerate your mental and financial reset.
courses_disclaimer: Preview — we'll soon connect this section with your real courses.
master_sub: Your master coach to reprogram your mindset.
master_hero_sub: Ask me anything about mindset, abundance, habits or manifestation.
master_welcome: Welcome. I'm Master AI, your personal coach. What would you like to work on today? You can type to me or tap one of the topics above.
master_disclaimer: Simulated replies for demo — we'll soon connect to the real Master AI.
master_reply_abundance: Abundance begins when you choose to see yourself as someone who deserves to thrive. Write down three reasons why you deserve it today.
Money is energy and follows your inner frequency. Visualize for 2 minutes how it feels to already have exactly what you want.
Every time you say 'I can't afford it', replace it with 'how can I generate it?'. That shift rewires your millionaire mind.
master_reply_fear: Fear is a signal, not a wall. Name it out loud and ask: what is it trying to protect? Then take one small step anyway.
Breathe 4 seconds in, 6 seconds out for a full minute. Fear dissolves when we lower the body's frequency.
Your fears are not truths, they are programs. Choose a new belief today and repeat it three times before sleep.
master_reply_habits: Discipline beats motivation. Pick ONE habit and do it for 7 days at the same time. The rest will follow.
Your habits are the bricks of your identity. Ask yourself: what would the millionaire version of me do today?
Stack a new habit onto an existing one (e.g. after coffee, 5 min of journaling). Your brain won't resist it.
master_reply_manifest: Manifesting isn't wishing, it's aligning. Feel as if you already received it, and act from that certainty.
Write your desire in the present tense, thank it as if it's already done, and release the how. Life handles the path.
Visualize your goal for 5 minutes a day with all your senses: what you see, hear, smell, and how your body feels.
master_reply_meditate: Close your eyes now. Inhale 4 seconds, hold 4, exhale 6. Do this 10 times. Your heart coherence shifts your reality.
Meditating isn't stopping thoughts, it's not believing every one. Watch them pass like clouds for 5 minutes.
Before sleep, place your hand on your chest and repeat: 'I am safe. I am at peace. All is well'.
master_reply_affirm: Affirmation for today: 'I am a magnet for abundance. Money flows easily and joyfully into my life'. Repeat 10 times in the mirror.
'I am the millionaire version of myself. My decisions today build my financial freedom'.
An affirmation without emotion is just noise. Smile while saying it and your subconscious absorbs it.
master_reply_default: Great reflection. Tell me a bit more — what emotion comes up when you think about it?
Take a deep breath before answering: what version of yourself gets activated by this question?
I'm curious. Is this something you've felt for a while or did it just appear?
Notice what you feel in your body right now. The body always gives the first answer.
Remember: there are no wrong answers. Trust your intuition and keep writing to me.

community_challenge_2_sub: Write your intention and share your signs.
community_post_1: Day 14 of the Reset and I already signed my first client of the month. The 432 Hz frequency has me in a different state.
community_post_2: Does anyone else listen to the Abundance program before sleeping? I've done it 9 days in a row, the dreams are next level.
community_post_3: Finished the 21-day challenge. Result: tripled my income and mental calm. Thank you community.
community_post_4: Tip: use wired headphones for binaural. Bluetooth changes the delay between channels.
